column1: Table 14. Outbound trips, oversea nights and total trip expenditure by main destination for oversea tripsa,
a. All figures relate to Australian residents aged 14 years and over.
np. Data is not publishable as the error is too high for most practical purposes.
Source: Tourism Research Australia: Domestic Tourism Statistics

Note: Production of Australian resident tourism statistics by Tourism Research Australia (TRA) had changed from January 2025. Methodology changes have resulted in a series break for Outbound trips data. Changes include change in collection mode to face-to-face interviewing (previously mobile phone), population estimates now including residents aged 14+ (previously 15+), and increasing the survey recall period to 4 months (previously 3 months). Comparisons with data prior to January 2025 should proceed with caution.

For more details please visit https://www.tra.gov.au/en/domestic/changes-to-the-australian-resident-tourism-statistics-collection-in-2025.
